chips.name: ESP32-C6

chip_specs.sram: 520 KB SRAM, including 8 KB RTC FAST SRAM and 8 KB RTC SLOW SRAM.

chips.name: ESP8266EX

chip_specs.cpu: Single-core Tensilica L106 32-bit processor up to 160 MHz
chip_specs.sram: Around 50 KB heap plus data memory available to applications.
chip_specs.rom: Boot ROM plus external SPI flash for user programs.

notes: Connect XPD_DCDC to EXT_RSTB when GPIO16 is used for deep-sleep wakeup.
GPIO16 can only be configured with an internal pull-down.
